text: @DrMabati Bruised egos being stroked with our money. And there is nothing as bad as a shamed he-goat in its own pen. Watu wa Rift wametigisha hiyo kakitu kabisa. By next year this time, there is nothing he will not try to unleash upon us. BUT… WE WILL STAND STRONG, to ensure #RutoGoes
